properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 84/21

 THE NORWEGIAN AIRFORCE WILL CONDUCT AIRDROP OF CALIBRATION SPHERES 
 0900 TO 1700 UTC DAILY 6 TO 7 JUL. VESSELS ARE REQUESTED TO STAY OUTSIDE 
 FOLLOWING DANGER AREA WITH A RADIUS OF 4NM FROM THE POSITIONS:

 POSITION 1
 70-42.17N 31-21.05E
 POSITION 2
 71-01.13N 31-34.02E
